title: NexusEvent
description: m40 substrate-feedback envelope emitted from wf-crystallise to SYNTHEX v2 :8092 /v3/nexus/push. MVP per Cluster H spec uses Option A untyped payload; M1+ tightens. Outbox-first JSONL buffer + circuit breaker (2 consecutive peer failures) wraps the emit.

event_id.description: UUIDv4 — per-event idempotency key for outbox replay

session_id.description: Session correlation key (links to atuin / stcortex consumer events)

workflow_id.description: Workflow correlation key (UUID; links via m7 hub)

escape_surface_profile.description: Per CC-2 trust layer; required for dispatched/verified kinds

payload.description: Untyped JSON payload (MVP Option A). M1+ swaps to per-kind typed shape via oneOf.

outbox_seq.description: Append-only sequence in ~/.local/share/workflow-trace/outbox.jsonl; populated by outbox writer before RPC attempt
